entity: Michael Jordan was the 3rd overall pick in the 1984 NBA Draft (1st round, pick 3), selected by the Chicago Bulls out of UNC.
notes: Queries round=1 first-round picks across all draft years sorted by career_ppg DESC. MJ (27.04 PPG warehouse / 30.1 BBR) lands in the top ~10 of that universe — limit=50 keeps the assertion stable against Wilt/Luka/Oscar-tier PPG leaders from other classes. round_pick is NULL for the 1984 class in the warehouse (column populated inconsistently), so the fixture pins season/round_number/overall_pick/name only.
